title: gitleaks prerequisite
outcome: gitleaks added to the secrets module of the Dust manifest (default=false candidate, brew=gitleaks, detect=gitleaks, agent_safe=true, purpose 'scan staged/committed files for leaked secrets (pre-commit gate)') and to the Brewfile candidate install set. agent_safe=true because scanning/reporting is safe for agents (it detects leaks, it does not expose secret values into context the way a vault read would). The pre-commit hook that runs gitleaks on staged files is owned by the git-hygiene module; this story only lands the prerequisite.
validation: validate-secrets.sh [4/5] PASS: gitleaks present in manifest + Brewfile, agent_safe=true. dust doctor parses 42 tools cleanly and reports gitleaks as a missing optional (not installed on this host). Manifest tsv parse unaffected.
decisions: Placed gitleaks in the secrets module (this epic owns secret hygiene) rather than git; it is agent_safe=true and is NOT in the policy block_tools, so the no_secret_read rail assertion does not require it to be agent_safe=false
Kept it default=false (candidate); promotion to baseline happens before agent git workflows land in the git-hygiene module
epic_status: E02 complete: S1-S4 done. Tiered vaults (pass interactive vs sops+age files, non-overlapping, agent_readable=false); no_secret_read provably enforced (policy [secrets] + dust_require_secret_access guard exit 13 + dust doctor rail assertion); chezmoi pass-references guarded + agent-safe-excluded; gitleaks in manifest + candidate set. Gate: dust:validate-secrets (5/5 PASS) + dust:validate-dotfiles regression PASS. DEFERRED: live chezmoi diff/apply and real sops+age encryption (chezmoi not installed; no age recipient provisioned).
token_note: loaded 1 story block + STATE/ledger tail; no canon ref needed
